ddls:
CREATE TABLE "individuals" (
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each individual */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the individual */,
  "workclass_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the work class of the individual */,
  "fnlwgt" INTEGER /* Final weight (fnlwgt) associated with the individual */,
  "education" TEXT /* Educational attainment of the individual */,
  "education_num" INTEGER /* Number of years of education */,
  "marital_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the marital status of the individual */,
  "occupation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the occupation of the individual */,
  "relationship" TEXT /* Relationship status of the individual */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the race of the individual */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the individual */,
  "capital_gain" INTEGER /* Capital gains of the individual */,
  "capital_loss" INTEGER /* Capital losses of the individual */,
  "hours_per_week" INTEGER /* Hours worked per week */,
  "native_country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the country of origin */,
  "income_bracket" TEXT /* Income category (<=50K or >50K) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for contact purposes */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for contact purposes */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address for demographic analysis */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth for more precise age calculations */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Current employment status (e.g., employed, unemployed, retired) */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of employment */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company or organization */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Specific job title */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Years of experience in the current occupation */,
  "highest_degree" TEXT /* Highest degree attained */,
  "field_of_study" TEXT /* Field of study for the highest degree */,
  "date_of_data_entry" TEXT /* Date when the data was entered into the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("individual_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_workclass_id FOREIGN KEY ("workclass_id") REFERENCES work_classes ("workclass_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_marital_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("marital_status_id") REFERENCES marital_statuses ("marital_status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_native_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("native_country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_occupation_id FOREIGN KEY ("occupation_id") REFERENCES occupations ("occupation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "work_classes" (
  "workclass_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each work class */,
  "workclass_name" TEXT /* Name of the work class (e.g., Private, State-gov) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the work class */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the work class (e.g., government, private, non-profit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("workclass_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "occupations" (
  "occupation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each occupation */,
  "occupation_name" TEXT /* Name of the occupation (e.g., Exec-managerial, Adm-clerical) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the occupation */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry associated with the occupation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("occupation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marital_statuses" (
  "marital_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marital status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the marital status (e.g., Married-civ-spouse) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the marital status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("marital_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "races" (
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race */,
  "race_name" TEXT /* Name of the race (e.g., White, Black) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the race */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country (e.g., United-States, Cuba) */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region or continent the country belongs to */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "gdp" TEXT /* Gross Domestic Product of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)
